task_completion.description: Enable public user registration for B2B customers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Drupal 'Account settings' page showing the 'Who can register accounts?' option set to 'Visitors' or 'Visitors, but administrator approval is required'.

task_completion.description: Add a 'Company Name' field to the User entity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Drupal 'Manage fields' page for the User account showing a new field labeled 'Company Name' with the field type 'Text (plain)'.

task_completion.description: Add a 'Tax ID' field to the User entity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Drupal 'Manage fields' page for the User account showing a new field labeled 'Tax ID' with the field type 'Text (plain)'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the new fields are visible on the user registration form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Drupal 'Manage form display' page for the User account showing 'Company Name' and 'Tax ID' enabled (not in the 'Disabled' section), OR a screenshot of the actual user registration form displaying these two fields.

task_completion.description: Create a new user account with the specified B2B details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A user profile page, user administration list, or successful registration confirmation showing a user with username 'b2b_user', email 'b2b@example.com', Company Name 'TechCorp', and Tax ID 'TX-998877'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Drupal web interface via a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Drupal admin UI and registration forms, not a text editor or API client.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands (like Drush) to bypass GUI configuration.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows executing 'drush' commands to create fields or users.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database client to directly insert data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of tools like phpMyAdmin, DBeaver, or mysql CLI being used to modify the Drupal database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected machine name for the Company Name field is 'field_company_name'. The expected machine name for the Tax ID field is 'field_tax_id'. The test user must have the username 'b2b_user', company name 'TechCorp', and tax ID 'TX-998877'.
